_comment: Source URL for each PJM fixture, used by scripts/refetch-fixtures.py. The PJM markets-and-operations page server-renders Today's Outlook (current load, forecasted peak, RTO LMP, tomorrow's peak), the zone LMP table, and the gen-fuel-mix Highcharts JSON inline — all scrapable without an API key.

markets-and-operations.html.purpose: parse_todays_outlook + parse_zone_lmps + parse_fuel_mix — single page covers all three
